fields.name: recipient
fields.description: The identifier of the entity receiving the notification.

fields.name: channel
fields.description: The delivery method for the notification (e.g., email, SMS, in-app).

fields.name: message
fields.description: The content of the notification message.

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Indicates the importance or urgency level of the notification.

fields.name: dispatched
fields.description: Indicates whether the notification has been successfully sent.

fields.name: recordedAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the notification record was created.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Frequency cap (per week)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Max sends per (channel, recipient) per rolling 7-day window. 0 = uncapped. WIRING DEFERRED: needs stateful history query (gap — docs/Almadar_Std_Factories.md).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Trigger events
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event names that should fire a notification. Set this to the upstream event name (e.g. OrderPlaced, CheckoutCompleted) so this atom listens for events from the orbital that emits them. The orbital owning this trait reacts whenever the named event fires anywhere in the schema.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: subscribe to event, listen for event, react to event, watch for, wire upstream event, observe event from another orbital, cross-orbital subscription, on-event trigger

overridableConfigKeys.label: Channel
overridableConfigKeys.description: Delivery channel: in-app, email, or sms
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: delivery method, notification channel, send via, dispatch through

overridableConfigKeys.label: Quiet hours
overridableConfigKeys.description: Local-time window during which dispatch is suppressed. Both start and end required to activate. WIRING DEFERRED: needs @now-aware time comparison primitive (gap — docs/Almadar_Std_Factories.md).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Recipients
overridableConfigKeys.description: Recipient ids/addresses. v1.1 uses the first entry; multi-recipient fan-out lands in v1.2 (gap). When empty, falls back to the authenticated user.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Severity
overridableConfigKeys.description: info, success, warning, or error — controls styling

overridableConfigKeys.label: Suppression list
overridableConfigKeys.description: Recipient ids/addresses to skip (e.g. unsubscribed users). Suppression check runs before dispatch.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Message template
overridableConfigKeys.description: Text shown to the recipient; supports payload interpolation
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: notification text, message body, alert text

overridableConfigKeys.label: Trigger status
overridableConfigKeys.description: When set, dispatch only when the upstream event's `status` field equals this value (e.g. fire only when a record becomes 'approved'). Empty = fire on every subscribed event.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: on status, when status, status filter, only when, fire on, react on status
